title: Software Update - DFU - Incoming SMS during update
scenario: Incoming SMS does not interrupt or break Device Firmware Update (DFU) process on Poly Bluetooth audio device
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Start a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the connected Poly device.
5. While the DFU is in progress, have a second device send an SMS message to the Android device's phone number.
6. Observe the behavior of the DFU process on the Poly Studio Mobile app and the Poly device.
7. Wait for the DFU to complete or check its status after the SMS is received.
expected: The DFU process continues running without interruption and completes successfully. The incoming SMS does not break, pause, or cancel the firmware update.
